title: Binary God-vs-Satan coaching framework
description: For unclear/anxious clients, guide to a binary choice between God and Satan for the problem, mirroring Isaac Martin's case; aim for clarity and rapid transformation.
full_idea: Remember this coaching framework/objective if somebody is confused and they want clarity or they have anxiety what I need to help them do is get down to a binary choice of choosing God versus choosing Satan for the problem they’re in the same way that I did with Isaac Martin and his communication problem is the same essential process need to run on everybody if I can get everybody down to a binary that they believe makes sense I did my job. The faster I can do that better
source_text: Remember this coaching framework/objective if somebody is confused and they want clarity or they have anxiety what I need to help them do is get down to a binary choice of choosing God versus choosing Satan for the problem they’re in the same way that I did with Isaac Martin and his communication problem is the same essential process need to run on everybody if I can get everybody down to a binary that they believe makes sense I did my job. The faster I can do that better
